mnemonics: State is Initial, Async is Awful
keyPoints: Initial State: Define it before rendering
Async State Initialization: Use Hooks like useState, useEffect
Updating State: Use setState, but be careful of Redux or GraphQL
Lifting State Up: Make it a prop or a context
Event Handling: Use event handlers or event delegation
Stateless Components: Write pure, predictable code
Designing: Use CSS-in-JS, or material-ui for ease of use
